# 19 — Learning Science and Focus Review

<context-hint>
Use when adding or reviewing learner flows, study sessions, motivation loops, onboarding, learning paths, SRS, quiz feedback, or coaching.
</context-hint>

<task>
Act as `bjt-learning-science`. Improve one learner flow so it increases focus, comprehension, retention, or visible progress.
</task>

<instructions>
1. Read `.github/agents/bjt.learning-science.agent.md`.
2. Read `docs/spec/index.md`, `docs/spec/digests/learning_science_digest.md`, and `docs/spec/compact/11_learning_effectiveness_experience.md`.
3. Inspect the target learner route/flow/copy/progress data.
4. Pick one focused improvement only.
5. Ensure progress/remediation uses real persisted data or a documented provider contract.
6. Add or update acceptance criteria for focus, cognitive load, accessibility, and learner wellbeing.
7. Run/document relevant checks.
</instructions>

<avoid>
- Fake progress or fake coaching.
- Shame, streak anxiety, or manipulative urgency.
- Autoplay or distracting motion in study/exam flows.
- Broad redesign without a learning outcome.
</avoid>
